title: KPV
description: KPV (Lys-Pro-Val) is a naturally occurring tripeptide derived from the C-terminal sequence of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (alpha-MSH). It exerts potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects by inhibiting NF-kappaB signaling and modulating inflammatory cytokines, primarily used for gastrointestinal disorders and skin conditions.

research.title: Orally Targeted Delivery of Tripeptide KPV via Hyaluronic Acid-Functionalized Nanoparticles Efficiently Alleviates Ulcerative Colitis
research.summary: This study demonstrates that KPV effectively attenuates inflammatory responses in the colon and can be successfully delivered via nanoparticles to treat ulcerative colitis.

research.title: Effects of the COOH-terminal tripeptide alpha-MSH(11-13) on corneal epithelial wound healing: role of nitric oxide
research.summary: KPV was found to facilitate the reparative processes and speed up wound healing in corneal epithelial tissues through its anti-inflammatory properties.

research.title: Lysine-Proline-Valine peptide mitigates fine dust-induced keratinocyte apoptosis and inflammation
research.summary: Research shows KPV protects skin cells from oxidative damage and inflammation by modulating the MAPK/NF-κB pathway.

research.title: A KPV-binding double-network hydrogel restores gut mucosal barrier in an inflamed colon
research.summary: The study found that KPV-loaded hydrogels specifically adhere to inflamed colonic mucosa, restoring the gut barrier and reducing localized inflammation.

research.title: Inhibitory effects of the peptide (CKPV)2 on endotoxin-induced host reactions
research.summary: KPV and its dimer exhibit significant anti-inflammatory effects by reducing TNF-alpha production in response to bacterial endotoxins.

sentiment.summary: Users report significant success in managing chronic inflammatory conditions like eczema and IBS, often describing rapid relief from redness and itching when other treatments failed.

effects.label: Speed of Action:
effects.description: Skin-related improvements are often noted within 3 to 10 days of starting a cycle.

effects.label: Targeted Delivery:
effects.description: Research indicates KPV is most effective when delivered via specialized carriers (nanoparticles or hydrogels) for gut conditions.

effects.label: Synergy:
effects.description: Often stacked with BPC-157 for enhanced healing of the mucosal lining and connective tissues.

effects.label: Inflammatory Focus:
effects.description: Highly effective at reducing CRP and BUN levels in chronic disease states when combined with dietary management.

dosage.label: Subcutaneous Injection:
dosage.description: A common user dosage is 0.5mg (500mcg) pinned daily for 10-20 day cycles.

dosage.label: Oral Supplementation:
dosage.description: Often found in multi-strain probiotic capsules containing 45 billion CFU for metabolic and kidney health.

dosage.label: Topical Application:
dosage.description: Research suggest concentrations of 1-10 mg/ml are effective for localized tissue healing.

dosage.label: Stacked Dosing:
dosage.description: Frequently included in complex 'recovery' stacks at approximately 3.175mg per week.

sideEffects.label: Minimal Reported:
sideEffects.description: Users generally report high tolerance with few acute side effects compared to traditional steroids.

sideEffects.label: Appetite Suppression:
sideEffects.description: Some users mention feeling 'over' meals quickly, though this is often associated with other peptides in a stack like Retatrutide.

sideEffects.label: Potential Herxheimer Reaction:
sideEffects.description: In certain gut protocols, shifts in microbiota can cause temporary metabolic distress.

sideEffects.label: Injection Site Irritation:
sideEffects.description: Standard risk associated with subcutaneous administration of peptides.

availability.label: Research Chemicals:
availability.description: Primarily sourced through peptide sources rather than standard supplement retailers.

availability.label: Combining Agents:
availability.description: Frequently sold in formulations mixed with BPC-157 ARG or HCL for gut health.
